MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Continued To Dec-22-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL GROUT COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE (Gary M. Smith) is Continued to December 22, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 1, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Continued To Dec-22-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF PACIFIC INTERNATIONAL GROUT COMPANY'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE (Jeremy P. Brummond) is Continued to December 22, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 1, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied.
